docket_entries.description: TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (NO EXHIBITS TRANSFER FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-04-2016 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 525

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-04-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-04-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT BARBOSA, PETER MAILED TO RESPONDENT LEE, JOSEPH
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 (SC-100 STAMPED "VIA FAX" FILED BY LEE, JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT BARBOSA, PETER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-02-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $86.50) SERVED OCT-29-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BARBOSA, PETER
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF LEE, JOSEPH ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, JOSEPH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARBOSA, PETER $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $333.00 INTEREST, $136.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,969.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD TRANSFERRED
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY BARBOSA, PETER LEE, JOSEPH
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (BOTH PARTIES EXHIBITS TRANSFER TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF FEB-04-2016 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT REVERSED. PETER BARBOSA DOES NOT OWE JOSEPH LEE ANY MONEY. THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF DEC.-04-2015. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT APPELLANT BARBOSA, PETER TAKE NOTHING FROM RESPONDENT LEE, JOSEPH ACCORDING TO RESPONDENT'S EVIDENCE, THE DISPUTED FUNDS WERE PART OF RESPONDENT'S CAPITAL CONTRIBUTION AND NOT A PERSONAL LOAN. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2016 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-02-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-04-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-04-2015 - JUDGMENT.

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-04-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearance on Thursday, February 4, 2016 in Department 525:
Joseph Lee, Respondent/Plaintiff appears as Propria Persona with witness Hilary Thompson and Alexander Cordozar.
Peter Barosa, Appellant/Defendant appears as Propria Persona.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.
Respondent/Plaintiff, Joseph Lee testifies on his own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Group Exhibit (A) -operating agreement, e-mail, etc.

Alexander Cordozar responds to the questions from the Court and testifies on behalf of Mr. Lee.
Hilary Thompson also testifies on behalf of Mr. Lee and responds to the questions from the Court.

Appellant/Defendant, Peter Barbosa testifies on his own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit (1) - Master Certificates, copies of pay stubs, pay record.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly marked evidence is retained by the Court.

Judge Pro Tem Elliott A. Myles; Clerk J. Kong; Matter Not Reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Dec-04-2015 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Oct-02-2015 Continued To Dec-04-15 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 506
